# Optimal Offshore Solutions

> A KPO delivery team built by BPO operators, based in Bohol, Philippines, serving US & APAC. We stand up, recover, and scale customer and back-office operations that stay in SLA — and prove it on a dashboard the client can see. Positioning: "Offshore operations, held to the number."

Key facts:
- Founded by five operator-founders with 50+ combined years running BPO floors for Optum, Concentrix, Teleperformance, Sagility, Tech Mahindra, Foundever and Fusion BPO.
- Healthcare accounts are led by a licensed Registered Nurse — clinical depth plus operations leadership.
- Every engagement starts with a small, measured pilot; metrics are baselined to the client's KPIs and reported red-amber-green on an open scorecard from day one.
- Delivery runs on a four-gate system (Diagnose → Build → Sustain → Enable) and a six-dimension balanced scorecard (Client & Customer, Quality, Service Delivery, Efficiency & Cost, People, Compliance & Risk) with a critical-error override: any privacy, integrity or compliance breach forces the month's score to 0%.
- Quality standard: 4.0σ minimum for mature service lines, 4.5σ for healthcare and compliance work, tracked in DPMO monthly.
- Contact: hello@optimaloffshoresolutions.com · replies within one business day.

## Services

- [All services](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services): Nine service lines in three families — Managed Operations, Insight Services, Advisory & Enablement.
- [Program Recovery & Optimization](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/program-recovery): Flagship. 48-hour war-room diagnostic, DMAIC root-cause work, and a control plan that keeps recovered programs in SLA.
- [Offshore Setup & Expansion](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/offshore-setup-and-expansion): Stand up a new offshore site on gated ramp waves with day-one SOPs and capacity modelling.
- [Multichannel Customer Support](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/customer-support-outsourcing): Voice, chat, email and back office run as one measured operation (CSAT ≥90, FCR ≥80, In-SLA ≥95, QA ≥90 targets).
- [Technical & Healthcare Ops](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/healthcare-and-technical-operations): RN-led regulated queues; first-pass accuracy ≥98%, zero-PHI-incident discipline.
- [HR & Workforce Strategy](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/workforce-strategy): Forecast-led staffing, shift design, ramp and retention built to the client's volume curve.
- [Data Analysis & Reporting](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/data-analysis-and-reporting): Live dashboards plus the analyst layer; validated, defect-free reporting.
- [Research & Insights](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/research-and-insights): Verified, citation-checked research with zero tolerance for fabricated sources.
- [Process Documentation & SOPs](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/process-documentation-and-sops): Auditable, versioned SOP libraries that survive attrition.
- [Sales & Lead Generation](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/services/sales-and-lead-generation): ICP-targeted outbound and appointment setting measured on qualified meetings, not activity.

## Company

- [Our approach](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/approach): Pilot → Measure → Scale; four delivery gates; governance cadence from daily huddle to quarterly business review.
- [Why us](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/why-us): Operators not middlemen; defensible 0–5 scoring with result bands; Lean Six Sigma improvement engine.
- [Team](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/team): The five founders and their operating backgrounds.
- [Book a pilot](https://www.optimaloffshoresolutions.com/book-a-pilot): How an engagement starts — reply within one business day, a written pilot blueprint, then a measured 90-day pilot.
